hooks.statusMessage: parable-formatter: validating new parables in seed.ts...
hooks.prompt:
The file server/prisma/seed.ts was just edited. Check if any new parables were added.

1. Read the file: server/prisma/seed.ts
2. For each parable object in the file, validate:
   - title: 5–100 chars, no trailing punctuation
   - content: 100–2000 chars, at least 2 sentences
   - moral: 20–300 chars, does not duplicate the last sentence of content
   - readTime: equals Math.ceil(wordCount / 200), minimum 1
   - category connects to one of: wisdom, motivation, leadership, journey, loss, risk, trust, meaning
   - No placeholder text: Lorem, TODO, example, test
   - English only — no Cyrillic characters
3. If issues found — output JSON: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "parable-formatter warnings:\n<list each issue with parable title>"}}
4. If all good — output JSON: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "parable-formatter: all parables valid"}}

Before this git commit runs, review the staged changes.

1. Run: git diff --cached
2. Check against SagewayAI rules:
   - No TypeScript `any` types
   - Route handlers only: parse input, call lib/Prisma, return JSON — no business logic inline
   - Always import shared Prisma instance from '../lib/prisma', never instantiate inline
   - 404 pattern: Object.assign(new Error(msg), { status: 404 }) — no `as` casts
   - Zod: use .safeParse() not .parse(); use z.coerce.number() for query params; use .issues not .errors
   - No console.log in committed code
   - English only — no Cyrillic characters
   - Functions under 20 lines
   - /daily route must be declared before /:id
3. If any .ts files changed, run: cd server && npx tsc --noEmit
4. If blockers found — output ONLY this JSON (no other text): {"continue": false, "stopReason": "sagewayai-reviewer blocked commit:\n<list each issue on a new line>"}
5. If all good — output ONLY this JSON: {"continue": true, "hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "sagewayai-reviewer: all checks passed"}}

Before this PR is created, review all changes on this branch vs main.

1. Run: git diff main...HEAD
2. Check against SagewayAI rules:
   - No TypeScript `any` types
   - Route handlers only: parse input, call lib/Prisma, return JSON — no business logic inline
   - Always import shared Prisma instance from '../lib/prisma', never instantiate inline
   - 404 pattern: Object.assign(new Error(msg), { status: 404 }) — no `as` casts
   - Zod: use .safeParse() not .parse(); use z.coerce.number() for query params
   - No console.log in committed code
   - English only — no Cyrillic characters
   - Functions under 20 lines
3. Run: cd server && npx tsc --noEmit
4. If blockers found — output ONLY this JSON: {"continue": false, "stopReason": "sagewayai-reviewer blocked PR:\n<list each issue>"}
5. If all good — output ONLY this JSON: {"continue": true, "hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "sagewayai-reviewer: branch looks good"}}
